rows.label: qev013301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ah! I finally found you! I've
been looking for you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0002
rows.name:
With Captain Corondas gone... You're
the only one I can rely on now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0003
rows.name: Please, save our team...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_JNK0010
rows.name: Query[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Larry to first explain what happened.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_JNK0020
rows.name: Assist[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_SEL0021
rows.name: Agree to help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0004
rows.name:
R-right... First I need to calm down
and explain it, like you... calmly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0005
rows.name:
Without even hearing the situation...
That's so like you. Thank you. I'm
so glad I called out to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0006
rows.name:
...I need to calm down. Let me
explain from the beginning.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0007
rows.name:
Recently, members of Corondas's
team have been attacked by that
black Doll in succession.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0008
rows.name:
We've had a large number of
members go missing in action
without returning to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0009
rows.name:
So Captain Corondas personally
formed a rescue squad and
rushed out of NLA, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0010
rows.name:
But... even the Captain's unit went missing,
and now I'm the only member left...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0011
rows.name:
I didn't know what to do
anymore... [ST:playername ]... I remembered you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_JNK0030
rows.name: Appreciate[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_SEL0031
rows.name: Show gratitude for Larry's kind words.

rows.label: qev013301_JNK0040
rows.name: Gripe[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_SEL0041
rows.name: Complain that Larry only remembers you when it's convenient.

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0012
rows.name:
I couldn't forget the magnificent skill
you showed me before even if I tried.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0013
rows.name:
So please... Could you use that
power to save Corondas's team?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0014
rows.name:
You're right... A skilled BLADE
like you must be incredibly busy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0015
rows.name:
And... it might be shameful to rely
on a fellow professional like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0016
rows.name:
But I want to protect Corondas's
team no matter what. Please, use
your strength to save our members...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0017
rows.name: ...I knew you'd say that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0018
rows.name:
First, I need you to go help
Peter's squad, who went missing
in the Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0019
rows.name:
After that, I will contact you
as soon as I learn of the other
members' whereabouts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0020
rows.name:
Please be extremely careful
of the black Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0021
rows.name:
Corondas's team's Doll squad
was almost completely wiped
out by that single unit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_JNK0050
rows.name: Boast[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_SEL0051
rows.name: Assure Larry that you can take it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_JNK0060
rows.name: Agree[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_SEL0061
rows.name: Tell Larry you'll avoid it if possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0022
rows.name:
It's strange, when you say it I
actually believe it. Thank you, I can
feel at ease entrusting this to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0023
rows.name:
Yes... but if it's you... For
some reason I feel like you
wouldn't lose to that thing either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0024
rows.name:
I'm counting on you, then.
Please save everyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0025
rows.name:
Captain Corondas should be in
the White Tree Continent.
Please... save the Captain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0030
rows.name:
To be able to see everyone's faces like
this again... [ST:playername ]... thank you so much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0031
rows.name:
Please accept this reward. You
protected something irreplaceable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0032
rows.name:
We've lost many comrades, but
I will rebuild the team together
with Captain Corondas.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0033
rows.name:
Good luck to Elma's team as
well. I'm sure there are many
others who need your help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0026
rows.name: ...Bates...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0027
rows.name: ......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0028
rows.name:
...No... I have to look forward
right now. Mourning the dead
comes after... right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0029
rows.name:
Captain Corondas should be in
the White Tree Continent.
Please... save the Captain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0034
rows.name:
Huh... what happened to Captain
Corondas? I thought he'd be
coming back with you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_JNK0070
rows.name: Apologize[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_SEL0071
rows.name: Take responsibility for Corondas's death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_JNK0080
rows.name: Evade[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_SEL0081
rows.name: Tell Larry that Corondas's death was not your fault.

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0035
rows.name:
There's no need for you to apologize...
anywhere. Even so, you're the type
to apologize, aren't you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0036
rows.name:
It's okay... the one at fault...
is me, for being powerless to do
anything at a time like this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0037
rows.name:
...Ugh... For the Captain to be
gone... It's not all my fault...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0038
rows.name:
I'm sure someone with a strong sense
of responsibility like you would
say something like that, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0039
rows.name: I know... you aren't responsible...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0040
rows.name:
The one at fault... is me, for
being powerless to do anything
at a time like this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0041
rows.name:
............I'm sorry... The
sorrow is too strong... I
can't think of anything...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0042
rows.name:
Bates and everyone else joined because
they looked up to Captain Corondas...
what are we supposed to do now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013301_MSG0043
rows.name:
...Right, here is your reward. Thank
you for doing so much for us...[ST:wait ]
